name: io.github.zxf-work/tgms
description: Bi-temporal graph store with 13 verified temporal operators as MCP tools: time-respecting reachability, delta-motifs, snapshot diffs, burst detection, Allen interval joins, and as-of belief-state queries. Typed, deterministic, bounded, cost-guarded; read-only.

package_arguments.name: --store
package_arguments.description: Path to a TGMS store directory (create one with `tgms ingest` or `tgms synth`)
